steps.title: Use the definition after the colon
steps.content: The words after the colon define the Mekong River delta as constantly evolving and changing in size and shape. The blank needs a word that means active or always changing.

steps.title: Choose the change word
steps.content: The matching word means changing or active. Choice B means able to be maintained, Choice C means unchanging, and Choice D means without equal; none of those matches the constantly evolving description. The answer is A.
